head.title: Pasar Domba Bagus Rejo Mulyo - Portal Marketplace Kelompok Ternak

body.class: bg-[#f4f7f5] text-gray-800 antialiased min-h-screen flex flex-col

div.class: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-gradient-to-br from-forest-950 via-forest-900 to-forest-950 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center p-4 sm:p-6 transition-all duration-500 ease-out
relative z-10 animate-slide-up flex flex-col items-center w-full max-w-xl

span.class: text-6xl sm:text-7xl mb-6 filter drop-shadow-xl select-none

h1.class: font-outfit text-3xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-white mb-4 leading-tight drop-shadow-md select-none px-2

p.class: text-forest-200 text-xs sm:text-base md:text-lg font-medium mb-8 leading-relaxed select-none px-4

div.p: Portal Pemasaran Terbuka & Terpercaya Kelompok Ternak Bagus Rejo Mulyo. Hubungi pemilik langsung via WhatsApp untuk pinangan hewan terbaik Anda.

button.class: font-outfit bg-amberAccent-500 hover:bg-amberAccent-600 active:scale-95 text-forest-950 font-extrabold text-base sm:text-lg w-11/12 sm:w-auto h-12 sm:px-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 animate-pulse transform hover:scale-105 flex items-center justify-center gap-3

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-8 sm:py-12 relative z-10
flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-6
flex items-center gap-3 mb-2 justify-center md:justify-start

h1.class: font-outfit text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight bg-gradient-to-r from-amberAccent-300 via-amberAccent-400 to-white bg-clip-text text-transparent

p.class: text-forest-200 text-sm sm:text-base md:text-lg font-medium max-w-xl

div.p: Katalog Digital Terbuka Kelompok Ternak Bagus Rejo Mulyo. Pemasaran mandiri langsung dari peternak ke pembeli via WhatsApp.

button.class: font-outfit bg-amberAccent-500 hover:bg-amberAccent-600 active:scale-95 text-forest-950 font-bold w-full md:w-auto h-12 px-6 rounded-2xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 flex items-center gap-2 group justify-center

div.class: bg-white border border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-2xl p-4 text-center text-xs text-gray-400 tracking-wider shadow-sm

main.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto w-full px-4 py-6 sm:py-8 flex-grow

div.class: mb-6 sm:mb-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4

div.p: Daftar domba yang diposting oleh para peternak kelompok Bagus Rejo Mulyo.

div.class: flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center gap-3 w-full md:w-auto

input.class: w-full h-12 pl-10 pr-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 focus:border-transparent text-sm bg-white

select.class: w-full sm:w-auto h-12 px-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 focus:border-transparent text-sm bg-white

div.class: inline-block animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-4 border-forest-600 border-t-transparent mb-4
hidden py-16 text-center max-w-md mx-auto px-4
bg-red-50 text-red-800 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-red-200 shadow-sm
div.p: Gagal memuat katalog dari database pusat.

button.class: w-full h-12 bg-red-655 text-white rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-red-700 transition shadow flex items-center justify-center

div.class: hidden py-20 text-center max-w-lg mx-auto bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-8 px-4
div.p: Belum ada penawaran domba yang diunggah saat ini. Unggah ternak Anda untuk memulainya!

button.class: w-full sm:w-auto h-12 px-6 bg-forest-700 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-forest-850 transition shadow-md flex items-center justify-center mx-auto

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6 lg:gap-8

footer.class: bg-forest-950 text-forest-300 py-8 border-t border-forest-900 mt-12

div.p: Platform Jual Beli Terbuka & Terpercaya Kelompok Ternak Bagus Rejo Mulyo.
© 2026 Bagus Rejo Mulyo. All rights reserved.

div.class: flex items-end sm:items-center justify-center min-h-screen pt-4 px-0 sm:px-4 pb-0 sm:pb-20 text-center sm:block sm:p-0

relative inline-block bg-white rounded-t-3xl sm:rounded-2xl text-left overflow-hidden shadow-2xl transform transition-all sm:my-8 sm:align-middle sm:max-w-lg sm:w-full w-full max-h-[92vh] sm:max-h-none overflow-y-auto

button.class: absolute top-4 right-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm focus:outline-none transition-all z-10

h3.class: text-lg sm:text-xl leading-6 font-outfit font-extrabold text-forest-900 mb-5 sm:mb-6 flex items-center gap-2

label.class: block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1

input.class: w-full h-12 px-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 text-sm

label.class: block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1

textarea.placeholder: Contoh: Dusun Bagusan RT 02 RW 07, Sendangijo, Selogiri (Wajib Diisi)
textarea.class: w-full px-3 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 text-sm

label.class: block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1

select.class: w-full h-12 px-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 text-sm bg-white

label.class: block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1

input.class: w-full h-12 px-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 text-sm

label.class: block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1

input.class: w-full h-12 px-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 text-sm

label.class: block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1

input.class: w-full h-12 px-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-forest-600 text-sm

label.class: block text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1

div.class: mt-1 flex justify-center px-6 pt-4 pb-4 border-2 border-gray-300 border-dashed rounded-xl hover:border-forest-600 transition-colors relative bg-gray-50

label.class: relative cursor-pointer bg-transparent rounded-md font-semibold text-forest-700 hover:text-forest-600 focus-within:outline-none

button.class: absolute top-2 right-2 bg-red-655 hover:bg-red-750 text-white rounded-full w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-xs shadow-md transition-all
w-1/2 h-12 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-750 rounded-xl font-semibold transition active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center
w-1/2 h-12 bg-forest-750 hover:bg-forest-800 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold transition active:scale-95 shadow-md flex items-center justify-center gap-2

div.class: fixed bottom-5 right-5 z-50 max-w-sm w-full bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border-l-4 border-forest-600 p-4 transform translate-y-24 opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 pointer-events-none flex items-start gap-3
